B1.name: 超现实 + 色域绘画 + 生物形态

palette.notes: 深驼褐主色，血色域点缀10-15%，青灰雾生物形态

B1.lighting: 侧逆光+琥珀神光+烟雾散射
B1.rhythm: 长镜头凝视70%，抽帧慢动作20%，硬切断刀10%

B2.name: 赛博朋克 + 故障艺术 + 欧普艺术
B2.composition: Op Art几何条纹叠加古典构图
B2.texture: 数字信号质感与胶片颗粒对抗

B3.name: 梦核 + 蒸汽波 + 超现实
B3.rhythm: 慢动作记忆流，超现实时间扭曲

B4.name: 极简 + 装饰艺术 + 新古典

palette.notes: 新古典比例，装饰艺术几何

B4.lighting: 自然光50%+单一强光源30%+极轻霓虹20%
B4.rhythm: 长镜头凝视60%，静默留白30%，偶尔快切10%

B5.name: 怪核 + 童核 + 苍白核

palette.notes: 褪色糖果粉，苍白粉，病态绿

B5.composition: 比例失调，童物与荒凉场景并置

A1.name: 胡金铨 × Hollywood Golden Age
A1.fusion_core: 禅意静谧 × 戏剧张力
A1.lighting: 侧逆光+烟雾散射70%，戏剧化神光
A1.composition: 前景遮挡+极简留白70%，水平构图
A1.rhythm: 长镜头留白70%，抽帧慢动作20%

A2.name: 王家卫 × French New Wave
A2.fusion_core: 记忆碎片 × 存在自由
A2.lighting: 霓虹黄绿偏色，潮湿感，琥珀街灯
A2.composition: 手持不安，跟拍，倾斜构图

A3.name: 北野武 × German Expressionism
A3.fusion_core: 沉默暴力 × 阴影戏剧化
A3.composition: 极简构图，阴影分割画面
A3.rhythm: 长镜头凝视，硬切断，静默

A4.name: 李安 × Western Modernism
A4.fusion_core: 东方克制 × 视觉诗意
A4.lighting: 暖黄自然光，隐忍单光源
A4.composition: 情感负空间，风景尺度人物

B1×A1.fusion_core: 禅意剧院——古典构图溶入梦境
B1×A1.lighting: 侧逆光 casting amber god rays through smoke
B1×A1.composition: 70% negative space, minimalist King Hu composition
sample_prompts: Ancient temple courtyard, stones breathing with slow organic pulsation, moss developing in biomorphic patterns, Rothko-style color zones, wooden prayer beads floating mid-air, defying gravity, pale grey-blue mist color field, edges dissolving into void, side-backlight casting amber god rays through smoke, 70% negative space, minimalist King Hu composition, Kodak Ektachrome 1970s, 35mm coarse grain, surreal stillness, objects gaining life, celestial theater

Bamboo forest clearing, two swordsmen frozen mid-strike, sword blades transforming into organic coral tendrils, deep crimson color field expanding from center, Rothko intensity, smoke scattering side-backlight, theatrical god rays, time crystallized in martial arts frozen moment, biomorphic surrealism, wuxia dream logic

B1×A2.fusion_core: 记忆色场——记忆作为呼吸的有机体
B1×A2.lighting: neon bleeding into monumental color fields
B1×A2.composition: handheld camera drifting, step-printing slow motion
B1×A2.rhythm: Wong Kar-wai blue hour, surreal nocturnal organism
B1×A2.texture: neon tubes transforming into organic tendrils, breathing light

Giant clock melting over nocturnal cityscape, bronze dripping, time losing rigid structure becoming soft and organic, deep crimson color field dominating upper frame, Rothko intensity, mycelium cracks spreading through clock face, bioluminescent, Wong Kar-wai urban isolation, objects becoming alive

B1×A3.fusion_core: 沉默有机体——暴力转化为生物诗歌
B1×A3.lighting: Takeshi Kitano aesthetic, muted blue-grey, single cold light source
B1×A3.composition: static long take, camera fixed, monumental Rothko void

Figure at seashore, grey-blue infinite color field, ocean transforming into cellular mass, slow breathing organism, sky as monolithic grey void, no horizon line, Takeshi Kitano contemplative long take, 15-second static shot, surreal coastal isolation, organism and void merging

B1×A4.fusion_core: 压抑的潮汐——情感作为受限的有机件

Close-up of hands almost touching, skin developing organic texture, warm amber to deep crimson color field, desire as entity, fingers transforming into coral structures reaching, half-face in shadow, Ang Lee forbidden tension, surreal embodiment of desire, organism of longing

B2×A1.texture: film grain fighting digital signal, RGB splitting
